message:
fix(extensions): resolve 28 clippy errors from SEC-5.3 conflict

- Remove orphaned `export_incident_bundle` method referencing deleted types
  (IncidentBundleFilter, IncidentBundleRedactionPolicy, IncidentEvidenceBundle)
- Add missing `Eq` derives to QuotaBreachEvent, ExecMediationPolicy,
  SecretBrokerPolicy, ExecMediationLedgerEntry, SecretBrokerLedgerEntry,
  IncidentBundleFilter
- Add `#[allow(clippy::struct_excessive_bools)]` to IncidentBundleRedactionPolicy
- Add `#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]` to build_incident_evidence_bundle
- Replace `map_or(true, ...)` with `is_none_or(...)` in 6 filter closures
- cargo fmt cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
